meaning: n.家属(集合称),亲戚,同族,血缘关系,家族adj.有亲属关系的,性质类似的,同类的
examples: We have notified the next of kin.
Her next of kin have been informed.
Fair and foul are near of kin.
Next of kin have been informed and an inquest is due to be opened on Tuesday.
Marie Claire readers that are truly intrigued by the KIN can pick one up on eBay.
